name: editor4c: pasting text/html preserves inline formatting
_note: Phase B — paste text/html path. paste_text with an html payload (<b>) writes both text/html and text/plain to the clipboard; the editor's onPaste prefers text/html, parses it to a slice, and inserts with the bold mark. Verifies the pasted 'BB' text lands and carries font-weight:bold. Exercises the store-backed clipboardData getData('text/html') path added for rich surfaces.
